meta.title: NetScope — Network Diagnostics & IP Intelligence
meta.description: Port Checker, IP Lookup, DNS, WHOIS, SSL Inspection and Monitoring. Professional-grade network diagnostics in your browser.

auth.signin_subtitle: Continue with your GitHub or Google account. We never request write access.

home.subtitle: Port checks, IP intelligence, DNS, WHOIS, SSL inspection and uptime monitoring — one fast platform, free to start.

port-checker.title: Port Checker
port-checker.desc: Check TCP/UDP ports, scan ranges, detect services.
port-checker.meta_title: Port Checker — Scan TCP ports online
port-checker.meta_description: Check if a port is open on any server. Scan single ports, ranges, or common ports with latency and service detection.

ip-lookup.title: IP Lookup
ip-lookup.meta_title: IP Lookup — Geolocation, ASN, VPN/Proxy detection
ip-lookup.meta_description: Look up any IP: country, city, ISP, ASN, timezone. Detect VPN, proxy, TOR, hosting.

dns-lookup.title: DNS Lookup
dns-lookup.desc: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS records.
dns-lookup.meta_title: DNS Lookup — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS records
dns-lookup.meta_description: Fast DNS lookup for any domain. View A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS and CAA records.

dns-propagation.title: DNS Propagation
dns-propagation.meta_description: Check DNS propagation across 15+ public resolvers worldwide. See if your A, AAAA, MX, or TXT change is live everywhere.

http-headers.title: HTTP Headers
http-headers.desc: Grade security headers A+ to F.
http-headers.meta_description: Grade your site's HTTP security headers A+ to F. Check HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options and more.

tech-stack.title: Tech Stack
tech-stack.meta_title: Tech Stack Detector — What's this site built with?
tech-stack.meta_description: Detect frameworks, CMS, analytics, ecommerce, hosting and libraries from public response data.

redirects.title: Redirect Tracer
redirects.desc: Follow every hop, spot loops and downgrades.
redirects.meta_description: Trace every hop of a URL's redirect chain. Spot loops, HTTPS downgrades, and too-many-redirects that hurt SEO.

subdomains.title: Subdomain Finder
subdomains.meta_description: Enumerate subdomains from public Certificate Transparency logs. Fast, passive, no scanning.

cdn-detector.title: CDN Detector
cdn-detector.desc: Identify Cloudflare, Fastly, Akamai and more.
cdn-detector.meta_title: CDN Detector — What CDN is this site using?
cdn-detector.meta_description: Detect Cloudflare, Fastly, Akamai, CloudFront, Vercel, Netlify and 12+ other CDNs.

ssl-check.title: SSL Certificate
ssl-check.meta_description: Inspect SSL/TLS certificates: issuer, chain, expiry, cipher suite and TLS version.

whois.title: WHOIS / RDAP
whois.meta_description: Modern RDAP-based domain registration lookup: registrar, status, nameservers, dates.

reachability.title: Reachability
reachability.desc: HTTP, TCP, ping and global status.
reachability.meta_description: Test HTTP, TCP and ping reachability to any server, with response time.

email-verify.title: Email Verifier
email-verify.meta_title: Email Verifier — MX, disposable, SMTP probe
email-verify.meta_description: Verify any email address: syntax, MX records, disposable provider check, optional SMTP handshake.

email-auth.title: SPF / DMARC / DKIM
email-auth.meta_description: Check email authentication records for any domain. See SPF policy, DMARC enforcement and DKIM setup with warnings.

blacklist.title: IP Blacklist
blacklist.desc: Check an IP on 20+ spam DNSBLs.
blacklist.meta_description: Check if an IP is on 20+ major spam blacklists (Spamhaus, Barracuda, SORBS). Instant, parallel DNSBL queries.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.meta_title: JWT Decoder — Inspect JSON Web Tokens
jwt.meta_description: Paste a JWT to decode header and payload, inspect claims, and verify expiry — entirely in your browser, nothing sent to servers.

password-leak.title: Password Leak
password-leak.desc: HIBP check with k-anonymity — never leaves browser.
password-leak.meta_description: Check if your password appears in known data breaches. Uses Have I Been Pwned's k-anonymity API — only the first 5 SHA-1 characters are ever sent.

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Validator
dnssec.meta_description: Check DNSSEC deployment for any domain. See DS, DNSKEY and RRSIG records with warnings.

cookies.title: Cookie / GDPR
cookies.meta_description: Inspect Set-Cookie flags and third-party trackers loaded on any page. GDPR risk score.

opengraph.title: OG Preview
opengraph.desc: Social share preview for any URL.
opengraph.meta_description: Preview how your URL looks when shared on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Slack.

robots.title: Robots & Sitemap
robots.meta_description: Parse and validate robots.txt rules and sitemap XML for any host.

ipv6.title: IPv6 Readiness
ipv6.meta_description: Grade your domain's IPv6 deployment across apex, www, nameservers, and mail.

bgp.title: BGP / ASN
bgp.meta_description: Look up the BGP prefix, announcing ASNs and route of any IP. Or inspect an ASN's announced prefixes.

mixed-content.title: Mixed Content
mixed-content.desc: Find http:// resources on HTTPS pages.
mixed-content.meta_description: Find insecure http:// resources on your HTTPS pages that browsers block or warn about.

dashboard.title: My IP
dashboard.desc: Your IP, location, ISP, browser, OS.
dashboard.meta_description: Your IP, location, ISP, browser, OS, screen, timezone — all in one view.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to. Cancel any time.
pricing.free_desc: Everything you need to test and diagnose. No credit card required.
pricing.pro_desc: For teams that depend on always-on monitoring and a higher rate limit.
pricing.enterprise_desc: For organisations with custom SLAs, audit logs and on-prem options.
pricing.faq_change_text: You can upgrade or downgrade any time. Annual billing comes with two months free.
pricing.faq_change_q: Can I change my plan later?
pricing.faq_refund_text: Yes — within 14 days, no questions asked.
pricing.faq_data_text: All data is hosted in EU data centres (Frankfurt, AWS eu-central-1). We never sell or share it.

api_docs.title: API Reference
api_docs.subtitle: REST + JSON. Same endpoints the web UI uses. Free tier: 30 req/min, no API key required.
api_docs.auth_text: Free tier requires no key. Pro/Enterprise pass it in the X-API-Key header.
api_docs.rate_text: Per IP for anonymous requests, per key for authenticated. The current count is returned in X-RateLimit-Remaining; on 429, retry after Retry-After seconds.
api_docs.swagger_text: Try every endpoint live, with autogenerated examples and schema. Lives at:
api_docs.ep_port: Check whether a TCP port is open
api_docs.ep_dns: Look up A / AAAA / MX / TXT / NS / SOA / CAA records
api_docs.ep_ip: Geolocate an IP address with threat intelligence
api_docs.ep_email: Verify an email address (syntax + MX + optional SMTP probe)
api_docs.errors_text: All errors return JSON with these fields:
api_docs.library_text: No official SDKs yet — but every endpoint speaks plain JSON over HTTPS, so any HTTP client works.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.input_required: Please fill in this field before submitting.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
not_found.hint: Double-check the URL or head back to the dashboard.
not_found.search_hint: Looking for a tool? Try the search above.

cdn.title: CDN Detector
cdn.subtitle: Identify the CDN or WAF in front of any host.

dashboard.title: My IP Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Everything we can detect about your connection.

dns.title: DNS Lookup
dns.subtitle: Query DNS records for any domain.

dnssec.title: DNSSEC Validator
dnssec.subtitle: DS, DNSKEY and signature presence checks.

email_auth.title: SPF / DKIM / DMARC
email_auth.subtitle: Parse and grade email authentication for any domain.

email_verify.title: Email Verifier
email_verify.subtitle: Syntax + MX + disposable detection + optional SMTP probe.
email_verify.smtp_label: Perform SMTP RCPT probe (slower, may trigger spam filters on target server)
email_verify.no_mx: No MX records — domain cannot receive mail.

headers.title: HTTP Security Headers
headers.subtitle: Analyze response headers and grade security posture from A+ to F.

ip.title: IP Lookup
ip.subtitle: Geolocation, ASN, ISP and threat intelligence.

ipv6.title: IPv6 Readiness
ipv6.subtitle: AAAA coverage across apex, www, NS and MX.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.subtitle: Paste any JWT — decoded entirely in your browser. Nothing leaves your device.

mixed.title: Mixed Content Scanner
mixed.subtitle: Find http:// resources on HTTPS pages.

opengraph.title: OG Preview
opengraph.subtitle: Social share preview for any URL.

password.title: Password Leak Check
password.subtitle: HIBP k-anonymity check — your password never leaves the browser.
password.safe: Not found in any known breach
password.safe_note: This password hash isn't on HIBP's list — but that doesn't guarantee it's strong.
password.unsafe_note: Change this password everywhere you use it. Attackers have seen this exact password.
password.privacy_note: SHA-1 happens in your browser. Only the first 5 hash characters are sent to HIBP.

ports.title: Port Checker
ports.subtitle: Check TCP port reachability, scan common ports, or sweep a range.

reachability.title: Reachability
reachability.subtitle: HTTP, TCP, ping and global status check.

redirects.title: Redirect Tracer
redirects.subtitle: Follow every redirect hop, detect loops and HTTPS downgrades.

robots.title: Robots & Sitemap
robots.subtitle: Parse robots.txt and validate referenced sitemaps.

ssl.title: SSL Certificate Inspector
ssl.subtitle: TLS chain, expiry, cipher suite and grade.

subdomains.title: Subdomain Finder
subdomains.subtitle: Passive enumeration via CT logs.
subdomains.degraded_message: crt.sh is currently unreachable or rate-limiting us. Try again in a minute — this does NOT mean the domain has no subdomains.
subdomains.truncated_notice: Result capped — there are more subdomains we didn't return

tech.title: Tech Stack Detector
tech.subtitle: Detect frameworks, CMS, analytics and hosting provider.
tech.empty_reasons: The site likely has bot protection (Cloudflare challenge, captcha) or returned a minimal HTML page (login wall, SPA shell). This does NOT mean the site uses no technologies — try a public marketing page instead of an app/login URL.
